creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
It's not unfriendly :-) 

From a reference that I dropped in a closed issue in a different repo, it seems likely that it's working as intended: 

* limited functionality

– hardware-dependent. 

Please see the response to: 

<https://github.com/ksnip/kImageAnnotator/issues/123#issuecomment-753505316>
